data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: All messages between users are encrypted.
data.technical_spec: Implements end-to-end encryption using the Signal Protocol.

data.title: Two-Step Verification
data.description: Provides an additional layer of security by requiring a PIN during registration.
data.technical_spec: Optional security feature activated by the user to prevent unauthorized access.

data.title: Spam Detection
data.description: Prevents the spread of spam and malware through automated systems.
data.technical_spec: Uses machine learning algorithms to identify and block spam messages.

data.title: Account Locking
data.description: Accounts can be temporarily locked if suspicious activity is detected.
data.technical_spec: Monitors unusual login patterns and restricts access until verified.

data.title: Vulnerability Testing
data.description: Regular security audits and penetration testing to detect potential vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Engages third-party security firms to assess the robustness of the platform.
